description_long: This is a hardcover book with a beige or light tan cover, featuring a series of four black-and-white portrait photographs arranged vertically on the front. The book's cover is matte and has a subtle texture, with the title and other text printed in a muted red color. The spine is similarly colored, with vertically oriented red text. The back cover contains a block of printed text and a barcode in the lower right corner. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with white pages visible along the edges. The overall design is minimalist and elegant, with a focus on the photographic imagery and clean typography.
description: A beige hardcover book with a matte finish, featuring four black-and-white portrait photos on the front and red text. The design is minimalist and elegant, with visible white pages and a block of text on the back.
description_view_0: The book is seen from an angled top-down view, highlighting the spine with vertical red text and the thickness of the pages.
description_view_1: The front cover is fully visible, showing four black-and-white portrait photos and red title text on a beige background.
description_view_2: This angled view shows the front cover with the photos and text, as well as the book's white page edges and part of the spine.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, displaying a block of printed text and a barcode in the lower right corner, with no illustrations.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a vertical sequence of four black-and-white portrait photographs, each showing a person in a different expressive pose. The style is photographic and documentary, with no additional illustration or artwork present.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is beige with vertically oriented red text running from top to bottom. The design is simple and clean, with no decorative patterns or imagery.
